metadata.note: Captured against a dev server started on VITE_PORT=5174 from the playwright-stability worktree. The repo's default :5173 dev server in this environment is owned by a different worktree, so a second isolated instance was spawned for this capture. The commitSha/branch reflect this worktree's head at capture time; platform metadata reflects the profile.ts driver's process.versions.node (24.3.0), which is bun's bundled node runtime.

PROJECT.note: PROJECT.md in this worktree is 3.25 MB / 8364 lines (vs the 9.7 MB / 25K-line doc in the original symptom measurements). The symptoms still reproduce at AC-required magnitudes, just scaled to the doc size in this worktree.

cold-load-big-doc.interpretation: S1 reproduced. 11.2s to ProseMirror-visible with 1.5M rendered chars on a 3.25 MB doc. The 9.5s longest task and 8.9s script ms concentrate the main-thread block reported in /tmp/ok-perf/FINDINGS.md. At PROJECT=9.7MB in the original environment the numbers scaled to 15.8s single task / 20.2s TTI; in this worktree's 3.25 MB doc the pattern holds at lower absolute magnitudes.

warm-switch.interpretation: S2 reproduced. 737 ms blocking on click-back to the small README doc after visiting PROJECT — consistent with the 1.1s block in the original /tmp/ok-perf/FINDINGS.md (scaled to this worktree's smaller PROJECT). The ACTIVITY_MOUNT_LIMIT=3 subtree re-render dominates: every mode flip walks all mounted editors and Y.js observers keep processing in hidden Activity subtrees (precedent #18(c)).

mode-toggle.modeToggleLayoutMsSource: trace.layoutMs + trace.styleMs (scenario-wide upper bound; see note below)
mode-toggle.interpretation: S3 reproduced. Source→Visual toggle wall-clock 609 ms on PROJECT. The scenario-wide layout+style aggregate (2038 ms) is an upper bound — the scenario was designed with a 500 ms pre-ready breather so toggle-owned layout/style dominates the sum; the toggle's true contribution is between the 609 ms wall-clock and this upper bound, both above the AC-required 300 ms. The deferred browser style/layout recalc on display:none→visible for a 25K-node PM DOM is the pre-mount-both editors architectural cost (precedent #18(b)).

outline-polling.interpretation: S4 reproduced. 13 /api/page-headings calls over the 30s idle window matches the 2s refetchInterval hardcoded in OutlinePanel.tsx (line ~104). The initial request fires on component mount; the 13 subsequent polls are pure waste while the doc isn't changing. US-006 replaces this with a provider-update-event subscription.

S3-mode-toggle.note: Upper bound from trace.layoutMs + trace.styleMs; wall-clock modeToggleMs=609 ms is a stricter lower bound and also clears 300 ms.
